one_time_description: Correction of an error: land acquired through Canoe Lake TLE Trust not previously reflected in financial statements, increasing land and accumulated surplus by $5,931,000 (35,022 acres)
economic_notes: First Nation is a member of Meadow Lake Tribal Council (9 Nations). Has investment in Canoe Lake Resource Development Inc. (GBE). Treaty benefits claim initiated against Government of Canada in 2020, with $738,416 in costs financed through RBC loan. COVID-19 pandemic impacted operations including office closures, travel restrictions, cancellation of events. Future funding from First Nations Trust and Northern Lights CDC expected to be negatively impacted due to SIGA casino closures.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Auditor's report signed March 17, 2021 - over 11 months late. Emphasis of Matter paragraph regarding outstanding treaty benefits claim against Government of Canada financed by bank loans with insurance coverage. Prior year restated for correction of error adding $5,931,000 in land (TLE Trust land). One GBE (Canoe Lake Resource Development Inc.) accounted for by modified equity method. Canoe Lake Treaty Land Entitlement Trust excluded from consolidation. CMHC Housing Program consolidated. First Nation not in compliance with all loan covenants but management does not expect restrictions. Operating deficit of $3,740,591 within accumulated surplus. COVID-19 significant event disclosed. total_government_transfers estimated as ISC + MLTC Program Services + Meadow Lake Health & Social Dev Auth + MLTC Child & Family Services + CMHC + Health Canada + Sask Rivers School Division + Government of Saskatchewan = 10362292+3010100+3002829+764856+463365+92655+112355+13910+754587 - note First Nations Trust and Saskatchewan Lotteries may not be government transfers; total_government_transfers calculated as sum of clearly identifiable government sources.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
